message:
feat(sources): case-insensitive source name handling throughout

Make all source name lookups and comparisons case-insensitive:
- New helpers: source_names_equal(), find_source(), configured_name_keys()
- sources add: rejects case-insensitive duplicates
- sources remove: resolves stored canonical name, prunes sync status
- sources doctor/sync: filter by source_names_equal()
- Setup wizard: deduplicate selected hosts by generated name with
  SkipReason::GeneratedNameConflict feedback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
